extensionName.description: Chrome Web Store and browser extension name.

extensionDescription.message: Search, back up, export, and preserve your browser history locally.
extensionDescription.description: Chrome Web Store summary and manifest description.

savedSearchNamePrompt.description: Prompt title shown before saving a BrowseVault saved search.

statusEnterSearchBeforeSaving.description: Status shown when the user tries to save an empty BrowseVault search.

statusSaveSearchCanceled.description: Status shown when the saved-search name prompt is canceled.

statusSavedSearch.description: Status shown after a BrowseVault saved search is stored.

statusChooseSavedSearchFirst.description: Status shown when a saved-search action is used without selecting a saved search.

statusAppliedSavedSearch.description: Status shown after BrowseVault applies a saved search.

statusDeletedSavedSearch.description: Status shown after BrowseVault deletes a saved search.

buttonRemoveRule.description: Button label for removing a saved BrowseVault domain rule.

confirmOpenSelectedLimited.message: Open the first $OPENED$ selected URLs? $OVERFLOW$ additional selected URLs will be left unopened to avoid flooding tabs.
confirmOpenSelectedLimited.description: Confirmation shown before BrowseVault opens only the first selected URLs because the selected URL count exceeds the open limit.

confirmOpenSelectedMany.description: Confirmation shown before BrowseVault opens multiple selected URLs.

confirmOpenSelectedOne.description: Confirmation shown before BrowseVault opens one selected URL.

errorOpenSelectedFailed.description: Fallback error shown when BrowseVault cannot open selected URLs.

statusCopiedSelectedUrlMany.description: Status shown after BrowseVault copies multiple selected result URLs.

statusCopiedSelectedUrlOne.description: Status shown after BrowseVault copies one selected result URL.

statusInvertedVisibleResults.description: Status shown after BrowseVault inverts selection for visible results.

statusNoVisibleResultsToInvert.description: Status shown when there are no visible BrowseVault results to invert.

statusOpenCanceled.description: Status shown when opening selected result URLs is canceled.

statusOpenedSelectedMany.description: Status shown after BrowseVault opens multiple selected result URLs.

statusOpenedSelectedOne.description: Status shown after BrowseVault opens one selected result URL.

statusSelectedMatchingVaultRecords.description: Status shown after BrowseVault selects every record matching the current search.

statusSelectedRecordsNoCopyUrls.message: Selected records have no URLs to copy
statusSelectedRecordsNoCopyUrls.description: Status shown when selected BrowseVault results have no URLs to copy.

statusSelectedRecordsNoOpenUrls.message: Selected records have no URLs to open
statusSelectedRecordsNoOpenUrls.description: Status shown when selected BrowseVault results have no URLs to open.

statusSelectRecordsFirst.description: Status shown when a bulk action requires selected BrowseVault result records.

quickOpenHeading.message: Search tabs, bookmarks, downloads, and closed sessions

quickOpenHint.message: Uses the same query text and ISO day/date filters as the History tab. Results here are read-only and never affected by vault cleanup.

quickActionSwitch.description: Quick Open action label for switching to an existing browser tab.

quickActionRestore.description: Quick Open action label for restoring a recently closed browser tab or window.

quickNoSourceResults.description: Quick Open empty state when no live browser source results are found.

quickNoSourceResultsWithWarnings.description: Quick Open empty state when no live browser source results are found and source warnings are available.

quickUnknownDomain.description: Fallback domain label for Quick Open results without a parsed domain.

quickStatusSwitchedTo.description: Status shown after Quick Open switches to an existing tab.

quickStatusRestored.description: Status shown after Quick Open restores a recently closed tab or window.

quickStatusOpened.description: Status shown after Quick Open opens a result.

quickStatusOpenedInBackground.description: Status shown after Quick Open opens a result in a background tab.

quickActionFailed.description: Fallback error shown when a Quick Open action fails.

quickNoUrlToOpen.description: Status shown when Quick Open cannot open a result because it has no URL.

quickBackgroundOpenFailed.description: Fallback error shown when Quick Open cannot open a result in the background.

quickNoUrlToCopy.description: Status shown when Quick Open cannot copy a result because it has no URL.

quickStatusCopiedUrlFor.description: Status shown after Quick Open copies a result URL.

quickStatusSearchingBrowserSources.description: Status shown while Quick Open searches tabs, bookmarks, downloads, and sessions.

quickStatusSourceResultOne.description: Quick Open status for one live browser source result.

quickStatusSourceResultMany.description: Quick Open status for multiple live browser source results.

quickStatusSourceWarningOne.description: Quick Open status for one live browser source warning.

quickStatusSourceWarningMany.description: Quick Open status for multiple live browser source warnings.

statusPreparingArchive.description: Status shown while BrowseVault prepares a full JSON backup archive.

statusBackupSelfTestFailed.description: Status shown when BrowseVault refuses to download a backup after the generated archive fails its self-test.

statusExportedArchive.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports a full JSON backup archive.

statusPreparingCsv.description: Status shown while BrowseVault prepares a full CSV export.

statusExportedCsv.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports a full CSV file.

statusPreparingHtml.description: Status shown while BrowseVault prepares a full HTML export.

statusExportedHtml.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports a full HTML report.

statusExportedSelectedJson.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports selected records as JSON.

statusExportedSelectedCsv.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports selected records as CSV.

statusExportedSelectedHtml.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports selected records as HTML.

statusPreparingResultArchive.description: Status shown while BrowseVault prepares a JSON export for the current search results.

statusPreparingResultCsv.description: Status shown while BrowseVault prepares a CSV export for the current search results.

statusPreparingResultHtml.description: Status shown while BrowseVault prepares an HTML export for the current search results.

statusNoMatchingRecordsToExport.description: Status shown when BrowseVault cannot export current results because the current search has no matches.

statusExportedMatchingJson.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports matching current search results as JSON.

statusExportedMatchingCsv.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports matching current search results as CSV.

statusExportedMatchingHtml.description: Status shown after BrowseVault exports matching current search results as HTML.

statusReadingArchive.description: Status shown while BrowseVault reads a selected archive import file.

statusNoImportableRecordsOrRules.message: No importable history records or rules found
statusNoImportableRecordsOrRules.description: Status shown when a selected archive file contains no importable BrowseVault history records or rules.

statusReviewImportPreview.description: Status shown after BrowseVault stages an archive and shows the import preview.

statusImportCanceled.description: Status shown after the user cancels an archive import action.

statusChooseArchiveFirst.description: Status shown when the user tries to confirm import before choosing an archive file.

confirmImportChecksumMismatch.message: This archive checksum does not match. Import anyway?
confirmImportChecksumMismatch.description: Confirmation shown before importing an archive whose checksum no longer matches.

statusImportingArchive.description: Status shown while BrowseVault imports a staged archive.

importStatusRecordOne.description: Imported archive summary segment for one imported history record.

importStatusRecordMany.description: Imported archive summary segment for multiple imported history records.

importStatusRuleOne.description: Imported archive summary segment for one imported domain rule.

importStatusRuleMany.description: Imported archive summary segment for multiple imported domain rules.

importStatusVerifiedChecksum.description: Imported archive summary segment shown when the import checksum is verified.

importStatusChecksumWarning.description: Imported archive summary segment shown after importing despite a checksum mismatch.

importStatusDuplicateOne.description: Imported archive summary segment for one merged duplicate import row.

importStatusDuplicateMany.description: Imported archive summary segment for multiple merged duplicate import rows.

statusImportedArchive.description: Status shown after BrowseVault imports a staged archive.

backupHealthCurrent.description: Backup health status shown when the latest backup is inside the reminder window.

backupHealthDueOne.description: Backup health status shown when a one-day backup reminder window has elapsed.

backupHealthDueMany.description: Backup health status shown when a multi-day backup reminder window has elapsed.

backupHealthReminderOff.description: Backup health status shown when backup reminders are disabled.

backupReminderOff.description: Backup reminder status shown when reminder scheduling is disabled.

backupFormatUnknown.description: Fallback backup file format label when backup metadata has no format.

backupSelfTestNotTested.description: Backup self-test status shown when no restore self-test has run.

backupSelfTestPassed.description: Backup self-test status shown when a backup self-test passed without a record count.

backupSelfTestPassedRecordOne.description: Backup self-test status shown when one record passed restore verification.

backupSelfTestPassedRecordMany.description: Backup self-test status shown when multiple records passed restore verification.

backupSelfTestFailedChecksum.description: Backup self-test status shown when backup checksum verification fails.

backupSelfTestFailedCount.description: Backup self-test status shown when backup record count verification fails.

backupSelfTestFailedRestoreRows.description: Backup self-test status shown when restored row count verification fails.

backupSelfTestFailed.description: Backup self-test status shown when verification fails without a narrower reason.

backupConfidenceMissing.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown before the first restorable JSON backup.

backupConfidenceUnknown.message: Unknown until a JSON backup self-test runs
backupConfidenceUnknown.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown for legacy backup metadata with no self-test.

backupConfidenceHigh.message: High - checksum and restore rows verified
backupConfidenceHigh.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when checksum and restore row checks pass but no count is available.

backupConfidenceHighRecordOne.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when one restorable row was verified.

backupConfidenceHighRecordMany.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when multiple restorable rows were verified.

backupConfidenceChecksumRisk.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when backup checksum verification fails.

backupConfidenceChecksumMissing.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when a legacy self-test has no checksum to verify.

backupConfidenceCountRisk.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when backup record count verification fails.

backupConfidenceRestoreRisk.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when restored row count verification fails.

backupConfidenceRisk.description: Backup restore-confidence status shown when a backup self-test fails without a narrower reason.

backupSizeNotRecorded.description: Backup size status shown when backup metadata has no recorded byte size.

archiveHealthReady.description: Archive health status shown when sync and storage checks are current.

archiveHealthStorageNotRun.description: Archive health status shown after sync succeeds but storage self-check evidence is missing.

archiveHealthVaultReview.description: Archive health status shown when local vault data integrity issues are detected.

archiveSyncStored.description: Archive sync detail showing when Chrome history sync ran and how many records were stored.

archiveStoragePassed.description: Archive storage self-check detail shown after storage verification passes.

archiveStorageFailed.description: Archive storage self-check detail shown after storage verification fails.

archiveVaultRecordCounts.description: Archive vault integrity detail showing active and stored local row counts.

archiveIssueMissingUrlOne.description: Archive vault issue detail shown when one active record has no URL.

archiveIssueMissingUrlMany.description: Archive vault issue detail shown when multiple active records have no URL.

archiveIssueBadTimeOne.description: Archive vault issue detail shown when one active record has an invalid visit time.

archiveIssueBadTimeMany.description: Archive vault issue detail shown when multiple active records have invalid visit times.

archiveIssueDuplicateActiveOne.description: Archive vault issue detail shown when one duplicate active vault record is detected.

archiveIssueDuplicateActiveMany.description: Archive vault issue detail shown when multiple duplicate active vault records are detected.

archiveDeletedTombstoneOne.description: Archive tombstone detail shown when one deleted vault marker exists.

archiveDeletedTombstoneMany.description: Archive tombstone detail shown when multiple deleted vault markers exist.

archiveUnknownDomain.description: Archive insight fallback domain label for records without a parsed domain.

archiveDomainCount.description: Archive insight top-domain entry showing a domain and visit count.

archiveVisitOne.description: Archive insight visit-count phrase for one visit.

archiveVisitMany.description: Archive insight visit-count phrase for multiple visits.

archiveBusiestDayVisits.description: Archive insight busiest-day detail showing the day and visit-count phrase.

archiveActiveDayStatsOne.description: Archive insight active-days detail for one active day.

archiveActiveDayStatsMany.description: Archive insight active-days detail for multiple active days.

archiveDateRange.description: Archive insight date range shown when oldest and newest visit days differ.

activityFallbackLabel.description: Fallback label for an activity-log event whose stored label and type are not recognized.

activityTypeBackup.description: Fallback activity-log label for backup events.

activityTypeCleanup.description: Fallback activity-log label for cleanup events.

activityTypeDelete.description: Fallback activity-log label for delete events.

activityTypeExport.description: Fallback activity-log label for export events.

activityTypeImport.description: Fallback activity-log label for import events.

activityTypeRestore.description: Fallback activity-log label for restore events.

activityTypeRule.description: Fallback activity-log label for rule events.

activityLabelArchiveImported.description: Activity-log label shown after importing a BrowseVault archive.

activityLabelBlacklistRuleAdded.description: Activity-log label shown after adding a domain blacklist rule.

activityLabelCategoryRuleAdded.description: Activity-log label shown after adding a manual domain category rule.

activityLabelChromeUrlsAndVaultRecordsDe.message: Chrome URLs and vault records deleted
activityLabelChromeUrlsAndVaultRecordsDe.description: Activity-log label shown after deleting selected URLs from Chrome history and matching BrowseVault records.

activityLabelCurrentChromeUrlsAndVaultRe.message: Current Chrome URLs and vault records deleted
activityLabelCurrentChromeUrlsAndVaultRe.description: Activity-log label shown after deleting current-result URLs from Chrome history and matching BrowseVault records.

activityLabelCurrentResultsDeleted.description: Activity-log label shown after deleting the current BrowseVault search results.

activityLabelCurrentResultsJsonExported.description: Activity-log label shown after exporting current search results as JSON.

activityLabelDomainRuleRemoved.description: Activity-log label shown after removing a domain rule.

activityLabelDomainsBlacklisted.description: Activity-log label shown after adding selected domains to the blacklist.

activityLabelDuplicateCleanup.description: Activity-log label shown after cleaning duplicate BrowseVault records.

activityLabelFullCsvExported.description: Activity-log label shown after exporting the full vault as CSV.

activityLabelFullHtmlExported.description: Activity-log label shown after exporting the full vault as HTML.

activityLabelJsonBackupExported.description: Activity-log label shown after exporting a full JSON backup.

activityLabelLocalVaultReset.description: Activity-log label shown after resetting BrowseVault local data.

activityLabelRetentionCleanup.description: Activity-log label shown after cleaning old BrowseVault records by retention age.

activityLabelSelectedCsvExported.description: Activity-log label shown after exporting selected records as CSV.

activityLabelSelectedHtmlExported.description: Activity-log label shown after exporting selected records as HTML.

activityLabelSelectedJsonExported.description: Activity-log label shown after exporting selected records as JSON.

activityLabelVaultDeleteUndone.description: Activity-log label shown after restoring deleted BrowseVault records.

activityLabelVaultRecordsDeleted.description: Activity-log label shown after deleting BrowseVault records from the local vault.

activityLabelWhitelistRuleAdded.description: Activity-log label shown after adding a domain whitelist rule.

statusSettingsSaved.description: Status shown after BrowseVault saves display and search preference changes.

noDomainRulesYet.description: Rules-list empty state shown before any category, blacklist, or whitelist rule exists.

ruleGroupHeading.description: Rules-list group heading containing a localized rule type and number of rules in that group.

ruleKindLabel.description: Hidden accessibility label that names the kind of a BrowseVault domain rule.

ruleTypeBlacklist.description: Rules-list type label for domains BrowseVault should not archive in the future.

ruleTypeCategory.description: Rules-list type label for domains manually assigned to a category.

ruleTypeGeneric.description: Fallback rules-list type label for an unknown BrowseVault rule type.

ruleTypeWhitelist.description: Rules-list type label for domains BrowseVault should keep during retention cleanup.

retentionHint.message: Moves matching old vault records to undoable deletion. Whitelisted domains are kept during retention cleanup.

duplicatesHint.message: Finds active records with the same URL and visit time, keeps the richest record, and moves the rest to undoable deletion.

statusRemovedRule.description: Status shown after BrowseVault removes a domain rule.

chromeUrlLabelOne.description: Reusable count label for one Chrome history URL.

chromeUrlLabelMany.description: Reusable count label for multiple Chrome history URLs.

selectedBrowseVaultRecordLabelMany.description: Reusable count label for multiple selected BrowseVault records.

statusSelectedRecordsNoBlacklistDomains.description: Status shown when selected BrowseVault records do not expose domains for blacklist rules.

statusBlacklistedDomainsMovedOne.description: Status shown after BrowseVault blacklists one domain and moves whitelist entries.

statusBlacklistedDomainsMovedMany.description: Status shown after BrowseVault blacklists selected domains and moves whitelist entries.

statusNoMatchingVaultRecordsToDelete.description: Status shown when no BrowseVault records match current-result vault deletion.

statusEnterSearchBeforeDeletingCurrentRe.description: Status shown when current-result Chrome deletion requires a search query or date filter.

statusMatchingVaultRecordsNoChromeUrls.description: Status shown when current-result Chrome deletion finds no URLs.

confirmDeleteCurrentResultsChrome.description: Confirmation shown before deleting current-result URLs from Chrome history and matching BrowseVault records.

statusDeletedCurrentResultsChromeVaultOn.description: Status shown after deleting one current result from Chrome history and BrowseVault.

statusDeletedCurrentResultsChromeVaultMa.message: Deleted $COUNT$ current results from Chrome and vault
statusDeletedCurrentResultsChromeVaultMa.description: Status shown after deleting current results from Chrome history and BrowseVault.

confirmDeleteSelectedChromeUrls.description: Confirmation shown before deleting selected URLs from Chrome history and selected BrowseVault records.

statusDeletedRecordsChromeVaultOne.description: Status shown after deleting one selected record from Chrome history and BrowseVault.

statusDeletedRecordsChromeVaultMany.description: Status shown after deleting selected records from Chrome history and BrowseVault.

statusRestoredVaultRecordMany.description: Status shown after restoring deleted BrowseVault records.

statusAddedDomainRule.description: Status shown after adding a blacklist or whitelist domain rule.

statusCategorizedDomain.description: Status shown after assigning a manual category to a domain.

statusEnterRetentionDays.description: Status shown when retention cleanup needs a positive day count.

statusNoCleanupCandidatesOlderThan.description: Status shown when retention cleanup has no matching old BrowseVault records.

statusRetentionPreviewOne.description: Status shown when retention cleanup previews one old BrowseVault record.

statusRetentionPreviewMany.message: $COUNT$ vault records older than $DAYS$ days can be cleaned up. Whitelisted domains are kept.
statusRetentionPreviewMany.description: Status shown when retention cleanup previews old BrowseVault records.

confirmRetentionCleanupOne.description: Confirmation shown before moving one old BrowseVault record to undoable deletion.

confirmRetentionCleanupMany.description: Confirmation shown before moving old BrowseVault records to undoable deletion.

statusRetentionCleanupCanceled.description: Status shown after canceling retention cleanup.

statusCleanedRetentionOne.description: Status shown after retention cleanup deletes one old BrowseVault record.

statusCleanedRetentionMany.message: Cleaned up $COUNT$ old vault records. Whitelisted domains kept.
statusCleanedRetentionMany.description: Status shown after retention cleanup deletes old BrowseVault records.

statusNoDuplicateVaultRecords.description: Status shown when duplicate cleanup finds no duplicate BrowseVault records.

statusDuplicatePreviewOne.message: $COUNT$ duplicate vault record can be cleaned up. One record per URL and visit time is kept.
statusDuplicatePreviewOne.description: Status shown when duplicate cleanup previews one duplicate BrowseVault record.

statusDuplicatePreviewMany.message: $COUNT$ duplicate vault records can be cleaned up. One record per URL and visit time is kept.
statusDuplicatePreviewMany.description: Status shown when duplicate cleanup previews duplicate BrowseVault records.

confirmDuplicateCleanupOne.message: Move $COUNT$ duplicate vault record to undoable deletion? One record per matching URL and visit time will be kept.
confirmDuplicateCleanupOne.description: Confirmation shown before moving one duplicate BrowseVault record to undoable deletion.

confirmDuplicateCleanupMany.message: Move $COUNT$ duplicate vault records to undoable deletion? One record per matching URL and visit time will be kept.
confirmDuplicateCleanupMany.description: Confirmation shown before moving duplicate BrowseVault records to undoable deletion.

statusDuplicateCleanupCanceled.description: Status shown after canceling duplicate cleanup.

statusCleanedDuplicateOne.description: Status shown after duplicate cleanup deletes one duplicate BrowseVault record.

statusCleanedDuplicateMany.description: Status shown after duplicate cleanup deletes duplicate BrowseVault records.

confirmResetVault.message: Erase all BrowseVault local archive data, rules, and backup metadata? This will not delete Chrome history.
confirmResetVault.description: Confirmation shown before resetting BrowseVault local data.

statusBrowseVaultLocalDataErased.description: Status shown after resetting BrowseVault local data.

permissionHistoryDescription.message: Syncs available Chrome history, records new visits, and deletes Chrome URLs only after an explicit delete action.

permissionBrowserSourcesDescription.message: Power Quick Open search, switching, opening, copying, and recently closed tab or window restore.

permissionStorageDescription.message: Saves the local vault, rules, backup metadata, and display preferences in this browser profile.

permissionNetworkDescription.message: No remote code, analytics, ads, tracking, or page-content capture is built into the extension.

oldHistoryLimitDescription.message: BrowseVault preserves history from installation onward and can import files, but cannot recover visits Chrome already deleted.

nativeHistoryLimitDescription.message: Imported records live in BrowseVault; Chrome APIs do not reliably write arbitrary old visits back into Chrome's own history page.

deviceHistoryLimitDescription.message: Mobile, account, or other-device history depends on what Chrome exposes locally or what the user imports.

statusSyncingChromeHistory.description: Status shown while BrowseVault imports currently available Chrome history.

statusSyncedRecords.description: Status shown after BrowseVault imports currently available Chrome history.

errorChromeHistorySyncFailed.description: Fallback error shown when Chrome history sync fails without a detailed runtime error.

statusOpeningNativeChromeHistory.description: Status shown while Chrome's native history page is being opened.

statusOpenedNativeChromeHistory.description: Status shown after Chrome's native history page is opened.

errorNativeChromeHistoryDidNotOpen.message: Native Chrome history did not open.
errorNativeChromeHistoryDidNotOpen.description: Fallback error shown when Chrome's native history page cannot be opened.
